intake.featureName: when attempting to add a Journey Note, after entering the note and clicking Add, the sc...
intake.summary:
when attempting to add a Journey Note, after entering the note and clicking Add, the screen will go white and a 404 Page Not Found error displays. See attachments.

 

I am able to replicate this in our demo environment and also tested adding a note to an activity and an event and experienced the same issue.

acceptanceCriteria: User can filter activities by keyword without leaving the page
Filtering updates are announced clearly for assistive technology users
Keyboard users can open, clear, and navigate filter controls

promptOverrides.code: Dont use If  conditions you can change the entity_id to user_id for the fix
